STORY #17: ROMANTIC LOVE #1 - RESEARCH REQUIREMENTS

Story Theme: Cross-cultural love story (Romantic Love Across Cultures)

What to Look For:
- Couples from different cultures/ethnicities/religions/nationalities
- Overcoming family resistance or cultural barriers
- First-person accounts: "I fell in love with..." or "We met despite..."
- Emotional moments: family disapproval, cultural clashes, choosing love over tradition
- Happy endings: families accepting, building life together

What to Avoid:
- Stories already covered (check story-subjects-tracker.json)
- Fact-driven content (Wikipedia, academic papers)
- Stories without emotional depth

Source Types Preferred:
- Long-form journalism (CNN, NPR, CBC, The Guardian)
- First-person essays (Medium, personal blogs)
- StoryCorps interviews
- The Moth stories (if accessible)

Target: 3-5 sources (2-3 flagship 9-10/10 + 1-2 supporting 8-8.5/10)

Search Terms:
- "cross-cultural love story"
- "interracial marriage resistance"
- "falling in love different culture"
- "family disapproval love story"
- "interfaith marriage story"
- "love across cultures first person"
- "my interracial relationship story"
